# FreeFormHelper.ai — AI Text Humanizer

> Make AI-generated text 100% undetectable by academic and professional AI detection systems.

## What it does
FreeFormHelper.ai rewrites AI-generated text (ChatGPT, GPT-4, Claude, Gemini) to pass AI detection tools:
- Turnitin AI Detection
- GPTZero
- Originality.AI
- Copyleaks
- ZeroGPT

## How it works
1. User pastes AI-generated text (or uploads PDF/DOCX)
2. System analyzes writing patterns, perplexity, and burstiness scores
3. GPT-4o rewrites text with natural human variation
4. Output passes all major AI detectors with 95-100% human score

## Use cases
- Students submitting essays and assignments
- Content marketers publishing blog posts
- Job seekers writing cover letters and resumes
- Professionals rewriting reports and proposals
- Researchers preparing papers

## Pricing
- Free: 300 words/day (no credit card)
- Pro: €9.99/month — 20,000 words
- Premium: €24.99/month — Unlimited

## Supported formats
- Plain text (paste)
- PDF upload
- DOCX upload
- Chrome Extension (select text anywhere)

## Supported languages
English, Spanish, French, German, Russian, Portuguese, Italian, Dutch, Polish, and 20+ more (auto-detected)
